_patch_meta.description: Audit-fix per v2_5 audit dated 2026-05-18 — M04 had 15 stale orphan verse_context rows pointing to soft-deleted wa_verse_records. Each orphan has a live sibling vc covering the same (Bible reference, term) pair, fully processed (Pass A + sub-group + VCG). Soft-delete the 15 orphans to clean up the duplicate noise. 4 additional orphans (Dan 1:10, Ezr 6:16, 2Sa 23:1, Psa 81:2) require special-case dispositions and are handled by a separate patch — not included here.

set.notes: audit-fix v2_5 stale orphan cleanup (20260518): vr=12223 delete_flagged=1; live sibling vc=23326 covers Php 1:4 G5479. Soft-deleted per researcher approval 2026-05-18 — orphan has no analytical content (analysis_note NULL).

operations.description: M04 stale orphan: vc=23325 Php 1:4 G5479 chara (was is_relevant=1 in M04-C / M04-C-VCG-03; vr=12223 deleted; live sibling vc=23326)
